text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. One important branch of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data without being explicitly programmed. A more advanced type is deep learning, which uses neural networks to process information in a way similar to the human brain. AI has many practical applications in daily life. For example, it powers virtual assistants like Siri and Alexa, recommends movies on streaming services, and helps doctors diagnose diseases. As technology improves, AI becomes an increasingly useful tool for solving complex problems.
